name: cloud-delegation
description: Linear-as-queue + cloud-agent (Codex, Cursor) delegation workflow — issue creation, polling, push-back-vs-fix matrix, agent env constraints, AGENTS.md auto-sync hook. v1.5: don't-push-to-default-branch rule while cloud-agent PRs are in flight (queue bookkeeping commits locally, push only when queue empty — eliminates rebase churn from post-merge ROADMAP/CHANGELOG pushes invalidating other PRs' base SHAs).
